description_short: Sleep cool and supported with the CoolTEC Memory Foam Pillow made of perforated memory foam, designed to keep you up to 4° cooler throughout the night.

construction_layers.name: Foam Layer
construction_layers.notes: Supports the head and neck, does not sag or break.

cover_fabric.wash_instructions: Machine wash on delicate cycle with cold water.

proprietary_tech.name: CoolTEC™
proprietary_tech.description: Keeps the pillow temperature regulated by drawing heat away from the sleeper. Up to 4°C cooler.

faq_specs.question: Is memory foam good as a pillow?
faq_specs.answer: Yes, memory foam provides excellent support by conforming to the head's shape, ensuring neck alignment and comfort.

faq_specs.question: What do you mean by neutral spine position?
faq_specs.answer: It refers to the alignment of the head and neck with minimal stress, helping to prevent morning aches.
